falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,150 on any single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break of the August 2024 lows invalidates the 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug, proving this is not a similar bottoming structure but rather a continuation of the prior downtrend or a new breakdown

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained panic-level volatility contradicts a bottoming pattern; the August 2024 bottom saw VIX spike then rapidly normalize—persistent elevation means no stabilization and invalidates the HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further below -50 basis points
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Deepening inversion rather than the steepening recovery seen post-August 2024 bottom signals worsening growth expectations, falsifying the macro bottom thesis embedded in the pattern match

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
